name: Kale Sardine Citrus Bowl
steps: Massage kale with olive oil, add sardines, orange segments, and serve as a bowl.

name: Spinach Salmon Broccoli Plate
steps: Pan-sear salmon, steam broccoli, sauté spinach lightly, and plate together.

name: Turkey Sausage Greens Skillet
steps: Cook turkey sausage, add chopped kale and broccoli, and sauté until tender.

name: Kiwi Spinach Yogurt Smoothie
steps: Blend kiwifruit, spinach, and yogurt until smooth; serve chilled.

name: Sardine Broccoli Toast Plate
steps: Steam broccoli, top toast with sardines, and serve together as a plate.

name: Orange Kale Protein Salad
steps: Combine chopped kale, orange segments, and chickpeas; toss and serve.
